summary: Customer order form (Northwind Retail Group) under MSA-2026. Three substantive deviations: payment extended to Net 90 (beyond our Net 60 ceiling - escalates), a general liability cap raised to 3x (above the 2x auto-approve limit - auto-redline to 2x), and auto-renewal removed (acceptable as-is). Draft also deletes late-payment interest, which is not covered by the playbook and needs a human. Escalation required.

deviations.original_snippet: payable within ninety (90) days of the invoice date
deviations.proposed_text: payable within sixty (60) days of the invoice date
deviations.comment: OF-PAYMENT: standard is Net 30, acceptable to Net 45, fallback Net 60 for ACV >= 50,000 (this order is GBP 180,000). Net 90 is beyond Net 60, which meets the DRAFT escalate_if - a human must own this. Opening position is to revert to Net 60.
deviations.reply_point: Our standard payment term is Net 30; we can extend to Net 60 as a concession for an order of this size, but Net 90 is beyond what we can offer.

deviations.original_snippet: No interest shall accrue on late amounts.
deviations.comment: NOT COVERED - needs a human. The draft deletes the template's late-payment interest (4% above base rate) and states no interest accrues. The playbook has no position on late-payment interest, so this must be reviewed by a lawyer.

deviations.original_snippet: This Order Form does not renew automatically; any renewal shall be by written agreement of the parties.
deviations.comment: OF-AUTORENEW: removal of auto-renewal (renewal by mutual agreement) is acceptable without approval. No change needed - comment only.
deviations.reply_point: We are comfortable removing auto-renewal so that any renewal is by mutual written agreement.

deviations.original_snippet: three (3) times the fees paid or payable
deviations.proposed_text: two (2) times the fees paid or payable
deviations.comment: OF-LIABILITY-CAP: standard cap is 12 months' fees (1x), acceptable up to 2x. A 3x general cap exceeds the auto-approve limit but does not meet the escalate_if (not uncapped, not removal beyond super-cap heads). Redline the general cap down to 2x; we can offer a 3x super-cap limited to confidentiality and data-protection breaches if the customer needs more.
deviations.reply_point: We can move to a 2x fee cap for general liability, and separately offer a 3x cap for confidentiality and data-protection breaches if that is important to you.

draft_reply:
Dear Northwind Retail Group team,

Thank you for the order form. A few points on our side:

1. Payment terms: our standard is Net 30, and we can extend to Net 60 as a concession for an order of this size; Net 90 is beyond what we are able to offer, so we have proposed Net 60.

2. Renewal: we are happy with removing auto-renewal so that renewal is by mutual written agreement - no change needed.

3. Limitation of liability: we can agree a 2x fee cap for general liability, and we are also able to offer a 3x cap specifically for confidentiality and data-protection breaches if useful.

One further change in the payment clause (regarding late-payment interest) is still under review with the wider team, and we will revert shortly.

Kind regards,
Fictional Legal
